title: MacBlog September Update
description: In this update, we bring more new tabs, pages, and features to MacBlog to keep your experience on MacBlog more informational, fast, and clean. We also fixed and tweaked a few things. Here's what's new:

mainarticles.p1: The homepage of MacBlog and the Roadmap and Posts tabs had been "Coming Soon" for a very long time now, and in this update, we finally added content to these pages! Now, you can access MacWeb's lastest news, different post categories, and feedback forms directly from the homepage of MacBlog, and you can finally check out our blog posts and our future plans for MacWeb in the Roadmap tab! Other than these major new pages, we also added new pages for the new update posts, blog posts, and indivisual app's own update page with every update post listed on it. We also added Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy for you to check out our regulations and data collection plans. You can access them from the homepage 🆕.
mainarticles.p2: With an update every two months, our app's update pages are filling the navigation sidebar fast. That's why we added the new Sidebar Collapse feature, where if you click on the year header on the sidebar, every update page from that year will be collapsed, saving space from the sidebar! To view the pages again, just click on the collapsed year again. Simple and clean 🖱️!
mainarticles.p3: To keep your experience on MacBlog helpful, clean, and efficient, we improved many pages and our navigation across the site, while fixing small issues and bugs everywhere. We also improved and updated some outdated content and links 🐛.

others.other4: Fixed and updated sidebar and menu content.
